item.title: It's time for yet another unhinged XL Saturday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
same but i don't usually wear leather pants.. greetings online friends
wow great "party"
moving far away from hometown helps
solid 7.6/10
they forgot to put the milk in the bowls
gourmet so you know it's good
that sounds bad
have never tried a bit-o-honey
that's one of the best i've seen
sorry lady.. Eric is funny
how convenient that it's so close.. going w Creepshow
what else would it be named fo- ... ohhhhhhhhhh
i mean, yeah. but i need to learn magic real quick
mmm hmm
dislike
really is piss poor caretaking
i guess
that's my time.. have a great night gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: ♫ New-Wave/Pop tunes from the 80s & 90s • . ♪ ( ^-^)っ由
item.description:
01. "A Night out Dancing in 80's" r/OldSchoolCool @rockhistation https://redd.it/137fymh/
02. ERASURE • A Little Respect https://youtu.be/Rt4gTj3oLmY
03. PET SHOP BOYS • Always on my Mind https://youtu.be/RCHSkXFB46g
04. DURAN DURAN • A View To A Kill https://youtu.be/SithfB03Px4
05. A-HA • Take on Me https://youtu.be/3MyDgFdzlmU
06. DEPECHE MODE • Enjoy the Silence https://youtu.be/fatTdD65OPo ♫ When I'm with you Baby I go out of my head And I just can't get enough And I just can't get enough ♫ . . . #DepecheMode ♥️❤️❣️ #GoVOTE ✅ ❎ ⚧️ ☮️ ✌️

item.title: Honey Bee (genus Apis):There are only 7 recognised species of honey bee on the planet although they do break down into 44 subspecies. The main distinction from the 20,000 other species of bees is the production and storage of honey
item.description: Honey Bee (genus Apis): There are only 7 recognised species of honey bee on the planet although they do break down into 44 subspecies. The main distinction from the 20,000 other species of bees is the production and storage of honey and the construction of perennial, colonial nests from wax. Research has shown a single honey bee can visit 1500 flowers in a day so this infographic is not entirely factual but still Awesome just to take in what many bees achieve in a short lifetime.
item.dc:creator: Joyika
